{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211313013F97F5159DB076B61081"}"},"total":113},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7426342610314937113","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"历史画卷气势磅礴，再现一代帝王波澜壮阔的一生，康熙帝在位61年，中国国力强大，地域辽阔，除鳌拜，平三蕃，收台湾，战沙俄，平定蒙古，剿灭噶尔丹，发展经济，文化，奠定秋海棠疆域，顺应民心，被后世尊称为康熙大帝"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729085111,"group_id":"7287839444885834789","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+yUw15KpGAfGCOM4IYyjY7ARwI7/dH0SFi+riMappDI","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1889415308783226","user_name":"鲧禹王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1889415308783226","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7287839444885834789","book_info":{"abstract":"《康熙大帝》是由二月河创作的长篇历史小说。作者1984年起着手撰写《康熙大帝》，历时四年完成全书四卷共一百六十余万字。一卷至四卷由黄河文艺出版社出版，中国香港、中国台湾也相继推出繁体字竖排版本。
《康熙大帝》是一部宏篇巨制。作品具体、生动地描绘了清初“一代英主”康熙皇帝自8岁登极到69岁“驾崩”的61年的历史，并为读者勾勒出了一幅规模宏大、场面激烈的“熙朝盛世”的壮阔历史画面，艺术地再现了康熙在智斗.数拜集团，平定“三落”及朱三太子杨起隆的叛乱，东收台湾、西平葛尔丹以及宫墙之内皇子之争等重大事件面前发挥的重大作用和他的足智多谋，多层次、多角度地刻画了康熙皇帝睿智聪明、博学多才，却又不乏阴险绞猎、心狠手辣的性格特征，并塑造了一大批性格饱满、树翅如生的人物形象。
90年代初，《康熙大帝》获河南省优秀图书奖；1993年，《康熙大帝》获河南省第一届优秀文艺成果奖。2001年，改编成的电视剧《康熙王朝》亮相银屏。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ee8e29a9a39155a3911de3981e58c208~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"二月河","author_id":"","book_id":"7287839444885834789","book_name":"康熙大帝（全四册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8c8c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"43.4万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":988,"name":"历史小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=988&name=历史小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7511678545278536766","read_count":"4607","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1215962"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"226","tags":"历史,历史小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ee8e29a9a39155a3911de3981e58c208~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253981&x-signature=2b1lZRMc1LIi6H%2BcDxJFVzYelKo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"14"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211313013F97F5159DB076B61081"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":195,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1686},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7355493038473462553","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"情节跌宕起伏，发人深省，更可贵的是还原了满清鼎盛时代的历史，使国人明确了今日的国人自然会再创辉煌……。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712586356,"group_id":"7287839444885834789","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N56C8Sjrjjs894yNkd1pj8KfVzL+yY8xIsGm2DXcElk+","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619584&x-signature=COIg0Cf24es9cyIKjPOtpxTq078%3D","user_id":"2201693195339448","user_name":"用户87183881"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2201693195339448","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7287839444885834789","book_info":{"abstract":"《康熙大帝》是由二月河创作的长篇历史小说。作者1984年起着手撰写《康熙大帝》，历时四年完成全书四卷共一百六十余万字。一卷至四卷由黄河文艺出版社出版，中国香港、中国台湾也相继推出繁体字竖排版本。
《康熙大帝》是一部宏篇巨制。作品具体、生动地描绘了清初“一代英主”康熙皇帝自8岁登极到69岁“驾崩”的61年的历史，并为读者勾勒出了一幅规模宏大、场面激烈的“熙朝盛世”的壮阔历史画面，艺术地再现了康熙在智斗.数拜集团，平定“三落”及朱三太子杨起隆的叛乱，东收台湾、西平葛尔丹以及宫墙之内皇子之争等重大事件面前发挥的重大作用和他的足智多谋，多层次、多角度地刻画了康熙皇帝睿智聪明、博学多才，却又不乏阴险绞猎、心狠手辣的性格特征，并塑造了一大批性格饱满、树翅如生的人物形象。
90年代初，《康熙大帝》获河南省优秀图书奖；1993年，《康熙大帝》获河南省第一届优秀文艺成果奖。2001年，改编成的电视剧《康熙王朝》亮相银屏。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ee8e29a9a39155a3911de3981e58c208~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"二月河","author_id":"","book_id":"7287839444885834789","book_name":"康熙大帝（全四册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8c8c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"43.4万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":988,"name":"历史小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=988&name=历史小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7511678545278536766","read_count":"4607","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1215962"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"226","tags":"历史,历史小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ee8e29a9a39155a3911de3981e58c208~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253981&x-signature=2b1lZRMc1LIi6H%2BcDxJFVzYelKo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"33"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211313013F97F5159DB076B61081"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":41367,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":41423,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":5142},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7348417199254602558","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书读了好几遍 ，越读越觉得有意思 。从庙堂高处到民间百姓，娓娓道来 ，身临其境。写政治无出其右者 。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710940890,"group_id":"7287839444885834789","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2NoqNsWKeLymE0ZxZvrwXF+/hTvU2a0QN0kzhreFxt7","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/user-avatar/99777a7f58b750f7facbd83e36ebdde5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619929&x-signature=MPLFPnNNxPlGh%2FFtqKijarCK54Y%3D","user_id":"1073542915434606","user_name":"大道至简，我很简单"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1073542915434606","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7287839444885834789","book_info":{"abstract":"《康熙大帝》是由二月河创作的长篇历史小说。作者1984年起着手撰写《康熙大帝》，历时四年完成全书四卷共一百六十余万字。一卷至四卷由黄河文艺出版社出版，中国香港、中国台湾也相继推出繁体字竖排版本。
